description:
The HeadHapticPointMapper component handles mapping haptic points around and to the head area of a user.

This works as part of the game's robust Haptics system.

fields.Priority: The priority of this Mapper over other mappers.
fields.ShowDebugVisuals: Whether to show the area visual of the Mapper and the different haptics mapped to it.
fields.HeadCenter: The center offset of the head area compared to the slot this component is on (the head slot)
fields._debugVisual: The root slot of the current Debug visual.
